action.reasoning: Observation: Starting from scratch with empty workspace. Analysis: Need baseline model for global weather forecasting (Z500 and T850, 72h ahead). Small grid (32x64), should train fast. Decision: Create a simple UNet CNN with circular padding for longitude periodicity, latitude-weighted MSE loss. Train few epochs (5) to establish baseline and measure iteration time, then submit eval. Will use files: model.py (UNet), dataset.py (sliding window + normalization), train.py (training loop with logging), predict.py (inference).
